title: biophytum fruticosum var. papuanum
intro: Biophytum fruticosum var. papuanum, also known as the 'Tulsi of the forest', is a medicinal plant species that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Biophytum fruticosum var. papuanum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
